text: Standing at the threshold between an ordinary hallway and a vibrant, creatively designed exhibition, I feel a stir of curiosity. The modern glass walls and the luminous space inside seem to welcome inquiry, while the colorful, text-laden wall hints at a depth of knowledge and innovation. I’m struck by how places dedicated to research and development evoke both the excitement of discovery and the quiet contemplation of possibility. Here, I feel inspired and slightly in awe of human creativity and the myriad ways we seek to understand our world.
